Bernat Font

 Research Publications

  • From 3-D to 2-D turbulence transition in the wake of a circular cylinder

    15 Sep 2019

    [POST STILL UNDER CONSTRUCTION] In this post we review the physical mechanism responsible for the transition from three-dimensional (3-D) to two-dimensional (2-D) turbulence in flow past a circular cylinder at a high Reynolds $(Re)$ regime as the cylinder span is constricted. The physics governing 3-D and 2-D turbulence have been...
